news_items.headline: Dodgers May comes to a close
news_items.summary: The Dodgers have one more series to go to finish off their May schedule, hosting the Philadelphia Phillies for three games at Dodger Stadium. Philadelphia got off to a terrible start and fired their manager, but are 20-8 since under old friend Don Mattingly, while the Dodgers have won 12 of their last 14. The […]

news_items.headline: Baseball’s competitive balance issue, explained
MLB proposes first salary cap since 1994 strike
news_items.summary: Major League Baseball owners proposed a hard salary cap to players as part of the next CBA on Thursday, their first firm cap proposal since 1994.

news_items.headline: Pirates' Jones set to make first start since 2024
news_items.summary: Pittsburgh Pirates right-hander Jared Jones will make his first MLB appearance since 2024 when he starts against the Minnesota Twins on Friday night.

news_items.headline: BoSox's Whitlock put on IL with knee inflammation
news_items.summary: The Boston Red Sox placed reliever Garrett Whitlock on the 15-day injured list on Thursday with left knee inflammation. The move is retroactive to May 25.

news_items.headline: Tigers put Jansen on IL with pelvic inflammation
news_items.summary: The Tigers placed closer Kenley Jansen on the 15-day injured list on Thursday with pelvic inflammation.

news_items.headline: Pirates rookie Griffin (sore forearm) not in lineu...
news_items.summary: The Pirates kept shortstop Konnor Griffin out of the lineup for Thursday's 7-2 loss to the Cubs due to soreness in his right forearm.

news_items.headline: Texas' Smith (viral meningitis) unsure on return
news_items.summary: Rangers second baseman Josh Smith was back in uniform Thursday for the first time since being hospitalized in mid-May with viral meningitis but said he's unsure when he'll return to play.

news_items.headline: Ohtani dissatisfied despite L.A.'s no-hit bid, HR
news_items.summary: Shohei Ohtani lamented the flaws in his performance Wednesday night -- even after hitting a leadoff home run and positioning the Dodgers for a combined no-hitter.
